items.text:
Mai ye nhi kahu ga ki tuu nhi to koi nhi
Mgr mai ye zaroor kahu ga ki tujhse acchi koi nhi.
Mai iss dard me hu ki tum kis dard me ho…

Tumhare alfazon ko tumhari ankhon ne hara diya,
Tumhare alfaaz mujhse jhoot bolte rhe aur tumhari ankhen haqiqat bayaan krgai.
Tum zeher to do hum chai smjh kr pii lenge.

Bahut Muskurane ki aadat ka maaraa hua huu main,
Waha bhi muskura deta hu,
Jaha mere janaza sajh rha hota hai.

Tum meri hokr bhi meri nhi ho rhii janaa,
Phir bhi maine tumko bewafa nhi kaha.

Tum mere liye ek ramz-e-khuda ho,
Goya 'Arsh' kuch cheezen paas hokr bhi nhi milti.

Mai Mashwarah du to manogi kya?
Mai kahu kitabon ko chod insano ko padhna seekh lo, to seekho gi kya
Mai kahu ki pehla Insan mai bnn jaunga,
To meri shukrguzaar rhogi kya?
Mujhe jo kehna tha maine keh diya,
Tum ise ishk manogi kya?

Mujhe tumhare tabbasun ya zulfon me dilchaspi nhi,
Mai johri hu mujhe hiro ki keemat pta hai 
Mai tumhare ashkon ko girne se bachana chahta hu aur wo gir jaay agr to unhe uthakr unki kimat chukana chahta hu.

Ek Wo hai jo apni pasand btane ko taiyar nhi, 
Ek mai hu jo apni pasand jatane ko taiyyar nhi, 
Wo apni pasand mujhe batai to,
Mai uski pasand bnne ko taiyar hu.

Tumhari yadein aaygi mgr hum seh lenge,
Tum muskura dena ha me dekh kr hum dubara mohabbat me beh lenge...

Hum bhi tumhare tarah kuch buri aadaton me fase hai, 
Bss fark itna hai ki tum roo kr fase ho,
Aur Hum hass krr fase hai.

Takkabur, Ana, Qehar, khuddari, Humbhi rkhte hai, 
Pr na jaane kaise jbb wo samne hoti hai to lafzo pe ikhtiyar humhi rkhte hai.

Lgti hai jism pr chot to tum asuon se rote ho,
Kmbhakt iss baar to chot dil pr lagi hai khoon to behna chahiye

Teri yaadon ki mala aajkal khane lgi hai mujhe, 
Ye silsila agr jaari rha to,
Mere fana hone me abb baras nhi,
Kya tujko mere upper taras nhi!

Tum kya jano ki mere nazro me tumhari ahmiyat kya hai,
Tum zeher to do hum chai smjh kr pii lenge...

Wo smjhti kaha hai Mohabbat hamari, 
Khair mohabbat me har cheez smjhana zaruri kaha hai...

Tumne to itne asani se kehdiya chodo jaane do jo hona tha so hogya, 
Tum kya jano dard mera wo mera hote hote reh gya...

Tumhari chuppi hame kubool nhi,
Tumhari baatein koi fizool nhi,
Tum keh lo tumhe jo kehna hai  Hum tumhein sunne baithe hai
Tum dant lo to hum khush ho jaaynge,
Hass dena to hum mar hi jayenge!

Aai dunya tu mujhse mera zarf poochti hai,
Maine usse mohabbat kii hai jisko pana mushkil hai...

Tu mujhse naraaz nhi phir bhi khud se naraaz baitha hu main,
Door hokr bhi tere hi paas baitha hu mai,
Jee krta hai mana luu tujhe,
Prr tere saamne khush hokr bhi tujhse naraz baitha hu main.
Tum naraz mujhse mujhe acchi nhi lgti, Thoda khilkhilaya kro thoda chahchaahaya kro mujhe dekh kr thoda muskuraya kro.

Tujhe lgta hai ki teri aankhon ko koi padh nhi skta, mujhse pucho to shi usne kya-kya bayaan kiya hai mujhse,
Kuch baatein acchi thi aur kuch baton ne dil dehla diya meraaaaa,
Mere ankhon me Ankh daal kr bina lafzo ke sbb kuch bol gai teri ankhein mujhse aur tuu bolti hai ki use koi padh nhi skta...

Tumne to bade asani se keh diya ki malkin nhi hu tumhari jo man me aai kro,
Mujh naacheez se bhi to puchti kii tumko meri gulami psnd hai kya?
Har baar tumne faisla sunaya hai,
Kbhi gunehgar se gunah ki wajah puchi tumne?
Chlo gunehgaar ko to saza milni bhi chahiye pr mere haq me faisla kyu nhi kiya tumne maine to kuch galat bhi nhi kiya phir bhi baton me faasla kiya tumne.

Kal tkk teri khushbu mere paas thii mai baitha uske saath baatein krr rha tha, 
Aaj wo bhi jhod gai tanha mujhe, 
Ye sitam nhi to aur kya hai pehle tu door hogai mujhse phir usne bhi saath mera jhod diya...

Tum meri baat kyu nhi sunti?
Mai tumhe dantta rehta hu accha lgta hai kya?
Naa-nukur agr mgr kaise kyu krti ho,
haaa hmm jiii bilkul kyu nhi kehti.

Tumhari ankhon me mai kuch aisa dooba hu sanam,
Ki abb dam ghutna bhi accha lgne lga hai mujhe...

Tum mujhse ye sochkar kuch nhi kehti ki kehne se bahut kuch bigad jata hai,
Mujhse kaho phir to jano ki kehne se bahut kuch sudhar bhi jata hai.

Mai janta hu ki tum kisi Dard me ho,
Tum janti ho ki mai bhi kisi dard me hu,
Mai iss dard me hu ki tum kis dard me ho...

Tumhare alfazon ko tumhari ankhon ne hara diya,
Tumhare alfaaz mujhse Jhoot bolte rhe aur tumhari ankhen mujhse haqiqat bayaan krgai.

Teri kuch baatein mere dil pr kuch iss tarah zarb krr gai,
Kii chot bhi nhi lgi mujhe aur mera dil bhi toot gya.

Teri baatein yaad aa rhi hai aur mere ashk jam gai hain,
Thoda khoon bahaa luu kya?
Baaton se abb kuch nhi mil rha ranjish-e-isterabon ke siwa.

Tum thodi ahmak ho kya?
Pehle tumne mera dil liya,
Phir tumne mera chain liya,
Abb tumne meri neend bhi leli hai, 
Jbbkii tum mujhe pura ek baar me le skti thi.

Ye kya sitam horha hai mere saath,
Mujhe pta hai ki wo bhi kisii mod pr meri muntazir hai,
Mgr msla ye hai ki mujhe uss mod ka rasta nhi malum...

Bahut hogai baatein unki bahut aa gai yaadein unki,
Chlo abb unse mil krr aatey hain waise bhi raat bahut ho gayi,
Thoda soo jaate hain...

Hasratein khwahishen justuju chahat to tum thii hi meri,
Mgr abb to tum arzoo zarurat kami aur Darkhast bhii bnn gai ho.

Tumhari tamam gardishon me ek gardish hum bhi hai,
Ummeed krta hu ek din sbb jhod jaayengi tumhe mgr hum bina tumhare kahe kahi nhi jaaygen...

Tumhari keemat to nhi khuda se chuka skta hu mai,
Mgr haa mere ansu teri kisht bhar rhe hai...

Teri baaton ne mera dil dehlaa diya tha mgr,
Teri saadgi prr haami bhar rha tha main...

Tumhe kya lgta hai ki mrne ka shauk sirf tumhe hai janaa?
Haraaam-Halaaal ka msla nhi hota to hamari bhi rooh kahi latki hoti...

Tum sbb jaankr anjaan bni hui ho jana,
Mai sbb btakar bhi kuch bol nhi paa rhaa...

Tum kya puchoge haq pasandi meri mujhse,
Maine sirf usko maaf krne ke liye sbko maaf krdiya...

Tumne meri abhi bss shafqat dekhi hai,
Mujhe mohabbat dikhane prr amaada mtt kro...

Mai apna drr bta rha tha usko,
Mera jism tbb kamp rha tha,
Achanak se naa jaane kaise kapkapi band hogai meri,
Hosh me ayaa to dekha maine ki usne mera haath thaam rkha tha...

Kyaa drr hai tumko btao naa mujko?
Mai drr bhagane me mahirr hu,
Dekho, ye sawal bhi mera ek drr tha jisko bhaga diya naa maine,
Kehti ho tum ki 'Arsh' tum mujhko smjhte bahut ho, 
Phir Cheezen chupa krr jhutlati ho khudko.

Mai kho rha hu khud ko, 
Ye baat maine tumse kya boli tumne to wajah khud ko smjh liye aur door hogai mujhse,
Arey pagli, Ye to sochti ki kho rha tha khudko phir to paa rha tha tumko,
Bhool rha tha baatein aur jee rha tha lamhe, mrne ki khwahish thi meri phir tum jeene ka sabab bnn gai aur jbb sach btaya tumko to tumhi mere dukh ki bayas bnn gai.

Mai ye janta hu kii,
Mai Mohabbat ki misaal to nhi bnn paunga mgrr,
Barbaad logon me mera naam bhi ginaa jayga...

Mai likhne baithu to mujhe lafz nhi milte,
Mai agr sone jau to likhta rehta hu,
Khair, sone se pehle teri yaadein zaruri bhi to hai,
Kyuki tere aai bina mere khwab mukammal kaha hai...

Yaar, Mere kaano me aaj bhi ek lafz aise goonj rha hai,
Goya, Jaise aaj bhi mai use utne hi gaur se sun rha hu...

Maine ishare to bahut kiye tumhe mgr khul nhi paya,
Abb kaise samjhau tumhe ki kitaab ko bina khole padha nhi jata.
Tumhe lgta hoga ki maine tumse bss mohabbat kii hai, Tumhe kya maloom ki maine khud se Jung ki hai...

Tumhe mujhse mohabbat to naa hui abb adaawat to naa kro,
Maine maazi ko chhodne socha tha mgr usme tumhari yaad aa gai.

Isterabon ka Safar kuch yun chl rha hai mera,
Kii, Uske mere zehen se guzarte hi mujhko meri yaad aakr tadpati hai...

Tum kya puchogi meri aqeedat mujhse ya mere zarf-e-mohabbat pr sawaal uthau gi?
Tum meri hokr bhi meri nhi ho rhii janaa,
Phir bhi maine tumko bewafa nhi kaha.
Abb too bss mujhe yaha se sheher-e-Adal jana hai lafz-e-Fana hokr...

Ankhon me ashk bhare hai,
Zehen me baatein unki,
Kaat rha hu daur-e-zindagi apni khatir unke...

Kyu tarsa rhi ho mujhko ek awaaz dedo na, 
Iss viraan raste pr kahi mai sada aage na nikl jaun,
Khair nikl bhi jaun ga to usme mujhko koi msla nhi,
Bss uss me bhi khayal tera hi hai ki tere bulane pr aate-aate der naa hojaay mujko.

Tum mera imtehaan kyu le rhi ho,
Kya mai hi mila tha tumhe iss jahan me kya,
Abb to mujhko darguzar krdo,
Abb to daureh-istarobon se bhi nhi nikl paa rha hu main.

Maine ek-tarfa mohabbt tumse itni kii hai jana,
Kii likh kr tere liye bhi tujko bhejta nhi tha mai.

Uske khatir utar gya hu behr-e-fana me mai,
Mujhe iska Jalal bhi nhi aur malal bhi nhi...

Soch kr aataa hu soch kr jata hu hrr jagah tujhe,
Pr ye Kya Sitam hai ki ek din bhool jaunga tujhe,
Bhulun ga tujhe mgr achhe ke liye tere,
Tum meri Mayyat prr roti acchi thodi lgogi.

Mere hathon me unka haath hon,
Mere paas unka saath ho,
Mai baitha rhu khamosh taveel Muddat tkk agr wo mere paas hon.

Haton me haath unka hai,
Mere paas saath unka hai,
Kya daleel du abb apne khamoshi pr mai,
Wo baithi hai sirhane mere...

Tum chli gai ho door to abb khud ka khayal rkhna,
Aur tum aaj bhi paas ho mere iss baat ka aitebaar rkhna, 
Jbb bhi yaad aai meri to mera darwaza khatkhata lena,
Naa khule mera darwaza to khud ko samjha lena,
"Ki mrr gya hai wo shakhs jiski talash hai tumhe"

Justuju aarzu aabru intejaa tum jo smjhoo,
Intezar hai tumhara tum kuch yun smjho,
Kuch baatein bachi hai jinko puri Krna hai hame,
Tum ise milne ka bahana smjho ya jo smjho, 
Kuch bhi smjho mgr ye na smjho ki hogai ho tum door mujhse,
Tum bagal me baithi bhi ho aur aas-paas bhi ho, 
Mere lafzo me ho meri baaton me ho meri kuch haseen yadon me ho,
Yr tum door hokr bhi mere paas hi mein ho.

Mujhe khwabon me rehne dogi,
Ya usse haqiqat tum banaogi,
Aa chuka hu itne niche ki abb,
Aabru aarzu inteja bhi Sharma gai hai mujhse,
Use ek-tarfa rehne dogi,
Yaa tum bhi shama jalaugi,
Loog abb intezaar ko arsh naam de rhe hai
Loog tehre hue hai meri barbadi dekhne ko,
Tum hami bhar krr kya unko chaukaugi?

Teri chahaton se isterabon me gum gya hu mai,
Tujhe paane ki zidd bhi hai,
Ussi zid me tujhe khone ka drr bhi hai,
Tere khwaab me aane ki justuju bhi hai,
Tujhse door jaane ka manzar liye.

Tootkar bikhar gya hu kanch ki tarah,
Jbse dekha hai maine tujko mujhko mera aqs pyara nhi.

Mujhko maloom nhi husn ki misaal jana,
Meri nazron mein hrr wo shaks khoobsurat hai jo tujhsa dikhta ho...

Har Safar Chota maaloom hota agr wo mere paas hota,
Kat jati daur e mushkilaat saari yunhi haste khelte,
Agr Quwa khud pyase ke paas hota,
Naa padti zarurat kisi sahare ki mera sahara khud mere paas hota,
Kyu bolu jhoot abb, agr wo mere saath hota, 
Naa ankhein meri laal hoti naa wo baatein chaar hoti,
Muskurata khuda bhi dekh kr hame,
Jaise wo pal dunya me akhiri baar hota.

Hai nhi gila mujhko mgr,
Ye kaise maanlun ki tuu bhi azaad h...

Hum Mussanif hai janab muft me kya arbo me nhi bikte,
Hum lafzon ke kimat batate hai bazaaro me nhi bikte.

Logon ka kehna hai mujhse,
Kii, Tere chehre pr to nhi mgr tere baaton me zakhm saaf dikhte hai, 
Kya jawab du abb unko kii Rab ne mujhko dimag to accha nawaza mgr dil nadaan de diya.

Meri kismat kuch aisi hai,
kii, Ujalon me kho gya tha mai,
Aur, Andheron me mujhe rasta mil gaya...

Abb mai khudki barbadi ka Afsana kuch iss tarah likhta hu,
Kii padhkr aur barbaad ho jau.
Meri hi baatein abb chub rhi hai mujko, jise sunkr loog khush hua krte the...

Jalegen loog dekhkr tarakki hamari 
Kii ye jalte jalte bhi krgya aur hum dekhte reh gai

Behoshi ka alam hai Sirfaroshi si zindagi,
Mai gum me dooba hu apni harkaton ke zarye...

Mere chehre prr muskurahat ka parda chadha hai,
Mera Imaan sbko chehra dikhane ki ijazat nhi deta..

Aaj meri yaum-e-wiladat hai kya?
Yaar mai to mar gya tha naa...

Hum hawa se udd jaay gubaar thodi hai,
Pahad hai khud ke mizaaj me azaar thodi hai.

Saal Guzar rhe hai umr badh rhi hai,
Zindagi bharose ka sila de rhi hai,
Mujhe piche chodh kr daud jeet rhe hai loog jinko jeet chodh kr sahara diya tha maine.
Accha tha mai mgr mujko meri achai khaa gai hai,
Abb bura hu mai phir bhi mere zehen me acchai aa rhi.

Thoda badh gya hu aage hai,
Thoda piche reh gya hu,
Bss umr badh gai hai,
Mai channd hadson me reh gya hu!
Wo jo accha tha wo Arsh?
Wo to shayad gum gya hai!

Loog kehte hai ki bigad gya hai tuu,
Mai accha bhi tha kya kbhi?
Accha bhi tha agr to kya mere saath accha hua kbhi?

Hai zimmedaryon ka bojh,
Wrna ashiq humbhi Kamaal ke the.

Hum thakte nhi likhte-likhte,
Tum padhne se kyu ghabrate ho,
Darte ho kya rone se,
Ya asuon ko tum chipaate ho.

Guzra hai tu saal dekr kai zakhm mujko,
Bhoolna bhi chahu ga tujhe to ye ghaav mujhe bhoolne nhi denge...

Aai nai saal dil se tera khair makdam kiya hai maine,
Abb mere isteqbaal ka lihaaz rkhnna...

Hai nhi sbr ka fal mitha koi,
Ye acche logon ne jhoot faila rkha h...

Hai Hindustan mera mai Hindustan ka hu,
Kaho isko Bharat ya kaho mujhko ghair-mulki,
Isse meri Mohabbat-e-sirzameen nhi badlegi.
Sirf naam badlega meri gaiyrat aur haya nhi badlegi.


Diya ek Waqar bhi tune, Diya Maqtab bhi humko,
Diya h Ustadain bhi tune, Khwab bhi bunwa hi diya h,
Dost-Yaar Bhai-Bandhu bhi diye h, Teri Jamia se qurbat bhi kra hii dii tune, Naa ruka yahan pr bhi tuu, Iss Sheher ki hawa aur fizaaon se Mohabbat bhi kra dii tune.

Devoted to SS AHMED KHAM

Hai Hindustan mera mai Hindustan ka hu,
Kaho isko Bharat ya kaho mujhko ghair-mulki,
Isse meri Mohabbat-e-sirzameen nhi badlegi.
Sirf naam badlega meri gaiyrat aur haya nhi badlegi.

Zindagi guzregi intezaar me hi,
Hum ne maana bhi to tha tumko khuda jaise...
